Our Story

The Heart Behind
Mandi King

Our Passion

Our passion for authentic Yemeni flavors

At Mandi King Restaurant, our story is rooted in a passion for authentic Yemeni flavors and the joy of bringing people together over great food. Inspired by the rich traditions of Yemeni cuisine, we set out to create a place where every dish reflects heritage, quality, and care.

From our slow-cooked mandi to our flavorful grilled specialties, each meal is prepared using time-honored techniques and the finest ingredients. But for us, it's more than just food — it's about creating an experience. We hope every guest who walks through our doors feels the warmth of our hospitality, enjoys the true taste of Yemen, and leaves with memories worth sharing.

Explore our menu
Our Craft

Authenticity in every bite

At Mandi King Restaurant, our story is rooted in a passion for authentic Yemeni flavors and the joy of bringing people together over great food. Inspired by the rich traditions of Yemeni cuisine, we set out to create a place where every dish reflects heritage, quality, and care.

From our slow-cooked mandi to our flavorful grilled specialties, each meal is prepared using time-honored techniques and the finest ingredients. But for us, it's more than just food — it's about creating an experience. We hope every guest who walks through our doors feels the warmth of our hospitality, enjoys the true taste of Yemen, and leaves with memories worth sharing.

View our gallery
Our Space

Experience true Yemeni hospitality

At Mandi King Restaurant, we want every visit to feel warm, welcoming, and truly authentic. Our goal is to create a cozy Yemeni atmosphere where families and friends can relax, share meals, and enjoy meaningful moments together.

Inspired by Yemeni culture, we highlight traditional hospitality, rich aromas of slow-cooked mandi, and a calm, comfortable setting that makes you feel at home. From the first bite to the last, we want our guests to experience not just great food — but the true spirit of togetherness and tradition.

Make a reservation
What We Stand For

Our values

Authentically Yemeni

Every recipe traces back to traditional Yemeni kitchens, unchanged for generations. We cook the way our grandmothers taught us.

Warm Hospitality

In Yemeni culture, a guest is a blessing. Every person who walks through our doors is treated like family — with care, warmth, and generosity.

Quality Ingredients

We source only the finest halal meats and freshest produce. Our spices are imported whole and ground fresh daily in our kitchen.

"Mandi King Restaurant is a taste of home, bringing the authentic flavors of Yemen. A truly unforgettable dining experience."
Mandi King
Yemeni Cuisine

A celebration of authentic Yemeni flavors, slow-cooked tradition, and warm hospitality — served with pride in Umm Al Quwain.
